content.en:
The three Eternal Realms on the twelfth layer were naturally more powerful, but Ye Tian still fought hard and finally defeated the three Eternal Realms and broke through the twelfth layer.

But at the thirteenth layer, Ye Tian still failed, mainly because the gap in combat power was a little large.

However, Ye Tian felt that if he continued to improve the fusion of his will and body, he would be able to defeat the three Eternal Realms of the thirteenth layer.

"This time, I have passed through the eleventh and twelfth layers one after another, and obtained 10 Tribulation Yuan Enlightenment Time, so I should hope to go further, and when the time comes, I will be able to create some top-notch Will Eternal Techniques, and I will be able to easily break through the thirteenth layer of the True Legends Tower. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently.

He entered the True Legends Land, where he began to cultivate, constantly fusing his will and body.

He had just started to cultivate, and he unexpectedly wanted to try to fuse his will with the innate eternal rules.

This attempt was incredible, and it was immediately discovered that in the true and unlegendary land, the speed of fusion of will and innate eternal rules was many times faster.

"This ......"

Ye Tian somewhat understood.

The True Absence Trace Tree in the True Nothing Legend Land is actually a sacred tree that fuses the will and the innate eternal rules, but it also has an effect on the fusion of the will and the body.

067 Then, Ye Tian began to fuse the will and the innate eternal rules with the help of true legends, but the fusion process of the will and the body did not give up, after all, he wanted to become stronger, break through to the eternal realm and even the legendary lord level as soon as possible, and also fuse all the will and body.

Therefore, the integration of the will and the body is even more important to him at the moment.

Before I knew it, ten years of calamity had passed.

At this time, Ye Tian's degree of fusion between his will and his body had reached a level of six in one, but the progress of the fusion of his will and the innate eternal rules was also very good, and the worlds of his will that had been opened up had all been fused with the innate eternal rules.

But if he used a standard to describe the progress of the fusion of the will and the innate eternal rules, he couldn't give a standard.

After all, even those wills and innate eternal rules of the will world are not completely and completely integrated, only a little bit of fusion, as if the will world can't completely withstand it.

However, compared with before, his strength has improved a lot.

After that, Ye Tian continued to create the Will Eternal Technique, and it took dozens of eternal years to perfect the Will Eternal Technique that he had created before to the level of the top Will Eternal Technique, and the threat level even surpassed that of the ordinary Legendary Eternal Technique.

Finally this day.

Ye Tian passed the thirteenth layer in the True Legend Tower, and obtained five more Tribulation Yuan cultivation and enlightenment time.

However, the cultivation time of the five tribulation yuan was not of much help, and Ye Tian had only increased the level of fusion of his will and body from the progress of one to seven in the true and unlegendary land. Lame.

"Unless you can have endless years of enlightenment, it is almost impossible to completely fuse your will with your body without legends!" -.If you really want to quickly integrate your will and body, I'm afraid you need other opportunities.

"Maybe I can go hunt the Void Beast!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

His current strength is already very strong, comparable to the powerful Immortal Realm, and he will also target the Void Beast's Legendary Eternal Technique and Will Eternal Technique, even if it is a half-step Immortal Realm powerhouse, the damage he gives to the Void Beast is not necessarily as high as his.

Moreover, he has multiple replica bodies, and even if one of them falls, it can be quickly condensed and not at a big price.

Thus, he earned money by hunting the Void Beast.

And even if there are clones in other Eternal Realms, they don't dare to take such risks, and losing a clone is a big loss.

"Let's go hunt the Void Beast, the three replica bodies will shoot together to hunt the first-order Void Beast, with my current strength, I am afraid that I will be able to kill the first-order Void Beast in an instant. Ye Tian said with a sigh.

this day.

Ye Tian left the range of the space-time territory, and the three replicating bodies penetrated deep into the void area, and the replication talent was turned on all the time.

In a place like the Void Zone, the Copying Talent can cover a wider range than his own exploration, and if he encounters a herd of extremely powerful or large Void Beasts, he will temporarily retreat and not meet them.

After shuttling for a long time, Ye Tian didn't find a single Void Beast, obviously after the initial defeat, the Void Beast retreated very deeply, resulting in not a single Void Beast being found here at all.

In this way, Ye Tianfei flew for a long time, and finally sensed the existence of a void beast.

"Second-Order Void Beast, no, you can't kill it instantly, I'm afraid it's close to the territory of the Void Beast here, once you can't kill it instantly, you can't escape in time. "

Ye Tian gave up this goal, and immediately left this area to find other Void Beasts again.

Soon.

Ye Tian found a first-order void beast, and the other party was slowly swimming in the void area.

"That's it!"

Ye Tian immediately cast his Void True Body, which was in a state of nothingness, so it was not easy to be discovered.

After approaching this Void Beast, Ye Tian immediately made a move.

"Cave Void Secret Sword!"

Poof!

The illusory Cave Void Secret Sword pierced directly through this first-order void beast, and with a single blow, it was seriously injured and dying.

Then, Ye Tian's second attack immediately came.

Will Slash Void Sword!

This sword directly slashed the Void Beast in two, and all its vitality was slashed.

The Void Beast has fallen!

Wow!

Ye Tian put away the corpse of the Void Beast and shuttled it at an extremely fast speed, and the three replica bodies shuttled away separately, so that even if they were surrounded by heavy surrounding, they would not be completely annihilated.

In case the whole army is wiped out, he will not be able to recondense the replica body here, and he will have to let the replica body rush over again, which will undoubtedly be a waste of time.

Fortunately, he was fast enough to avoid being chased by the Void Beast.

In the following days, Ye Tian continued to hunt the Void Beast in this Void Region, and also paid a copy body to cultivate in a not very distant area, constantly refining the Void Beast materials, so as to improve the fusion of his will and body.

In this way, Ye Tian hunted one Void Beast after another, and the degree of integration between his will and body became higher and higher, which meant that his own strength was getting stronger and stronger.

Eight out of eight fusion degree!

One into nine fusion degree!

Twenty percent of the degree of integration!

......

Ye Tian was very smooth at first, but as the number of Void Beasts disappeared more, he finally attracted the attention of the Void Beast King in this area.

This Void Beast King was a fourth-order Void Beast, comparable to the top Immortal Realm Lord, second only to the existence of the Legendary Lord.

It commanded quite a few Void Beasts, and it noticed that many of its Void Beasts were missing, and although it didn't care too much, it went to investigate.

And so.

Hordes of Void Beasts appeared in this area, and this caused trouble for Ye Tian's hunting. _
